subject: Fermi  trigger No 769611916: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V.Lipunov, E.Gorbovskoy, A.Kuznetsov, K.Zhirkov, I.Panchenko, N.Tiurina, P.Balanutsa, V.Topolev, D.Vlasenko, 
G.Antipov,  A.Sankovich, Yu.Tselik, Ya.Kechin, V.Senik, A.Chasovnikov, K.Labsina, I. Gorbunov (Lomonosov MSU),

A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory) 

MASTER-Tunka robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Applied Physics Institute, Irkutsk State University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB250522.55 (trigger No 769611916,00h 11m 31.92s , +62d 43m 01.2s, R=22.13) errorbox  14609 sec after notice time and 14646 sec after trigger time at 2025-05-22 17:09:17 UT, with upper limit up to  17.3 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 76 deg. The sun  altitude  is -18.5 deg. 

MASTER-Kislovodsk robotic telescope  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, Kislovodsk Solar Station of Pulkovo observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB250522.55 errorbox  38205 sec after notice time and 38241 sec after trigger time at 2025-05-22 23:42:32 UT, with upper limit up to  19.4 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 64 deg. The sun  altitude  is -17.1 deg. 

The galactic latitude b =  0 deg., longitude l = 119 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2878290

We obtain a following upper limits.
